ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Ricovrati in 1646. Updated bibliography of Giovanni Francesco Loredano`s works and their relationship with the Academy, in Tiziana Menegatti, Bibliografia delle opere a stampa del Principe degli Incogniti (2000). Loredano`s biography by Clizia Carminati, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
